name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl & Sopi backend v4.90 — Weimi GET signature confirmed deviceCode-only; rawOrdersDiagnostic now signs deviceCode-only and sweeps URL filter param spellings (startDate/endDate, startTime/endTime, current/size) to find which returns orders. Fixed list-length counter. Incl v4.86 favicon + mobile fixes.
